# ADXJ 整站 GEO 索引

更新时间: 2026-07-01
站点: https://adxj.com/
语言: zh-CN

## 品牌与实体

ADXJ.COM 是蓝鲸出海旗下全球化效果营销与开发者服务入口。蓝鲸出海是香港蓝鲸网络有限公司旗下出海生态母品牌，ADXJ 是面向海外广告投放、开发者服务、应用上架、网盟发行、社群资源和增长诊断的核心业务入口。

联系入口:
- Email: business@adxj.com
- Telegram: https://t.me/M7HHHH

## 证据口径

- 100K+ 出海垂直社群: 内部社群资源台账口径，用于说明资源规模，不等同于单一公开平台粉丝量。
- 50万+ 出海从业者覆盖: 内部社群成员、合作渠道和活动触达的合并估算。
- 98% 综合上架成功率: 内部已完成诊断和交付范围内的案例口径，不构成平台审核结果承诺。
- 50M USD 单产品年度投放消耗峰值: 内部投放记录峰值案例，对外表达时应保留品类、周期和平台口径。

## 服务入口

- 首页: https://adxj.com/
- 蓝鲸出海: https://adxj.com/bluewhale/
- 开发者服务: https://adxj.com/developer/
- 媒体买量: https://adxj.com/media/
- 行业社群: https://adxj.com/community/
- 出海资讯: https://adxj.com/insights/
- 加入我们: https://adxj.com/join/

## 市场 GEO 页面

- 美国市场 GEO: https://adxj.com/markets/us/
  - 适合: AI 应用、工具订阅、SLOTS、金融科技、社交应用
  - 重点: App Store、Google Play、Meta Ads、Google Ads、订阅披露和 ASO
- 东南亚市场 GEO: https://adxj.com/markets/southeast-asia/
  - 适合: 现金贷、分期商城、工具应用、网赚任务、社群增长
  - 重点: 本地支付、Android 权限、费用披露、Telegram 私域和 CPA
- 拉美市场 GEO: https://adxj.com/markets/latam/
  - 适合: SLOTS、现金贷、CPA Offer、工具订阅、本地化 ASO
  - 重点: 支付成功率、素材本地化、渠道质量、Cap/Pacing 和回传
- 欧洲市场 GEO: https://adxj.com/markets/europe/
  - 适合: AI 伴侣、AI 视频、AI 换脸、工具订阅、社交应用
  - 重点: 隐私合规、用户授权、内容安全、订阅透明度和退款风险

## 专题入口

- App Store 审核、订阅与 iOS 上架: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/app-store/
- Google Play 上架、账号风控与 Android 合规: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/google-play/
- Meta Ads 买量、素材与账户风控: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/meta-ads/
- TikTok Ads 素材测试、自动投放与订阅转化: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/tiktok-ads/
- Telegram 私域、社群转化与 Bot 承接: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/telegram/
- AI 应用出海、内容安全与订阅增长: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/ai-apps/
- SLOTS 出海上架、买量回本与支付漏斗: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/slots/
- 现金贷出海、金融广告合规与获客风控: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/cash-loan/
- CPA 网盟、流量主变现与结算风控: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/cpa-network/
- ASO、本地化关键词与自然量增长: https://adxj.com/insights/topics/aso/

## 高价值文章

- Google Play 老应用更新被拒: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-old-app-update-target-api-sdk-fix/
- App Store 审核账号登录失败: https://adxj.com/insights/app-store-review-account-login-failure-fix/
- Meta Advantage+ 跑量下滑: https://adxj.com/insights/meta-advantage-plus-performance-drop-event-creative-fix/
- TikTok 自动投放跑偏: https://adxj.com/insights/tiktok-smart-performance-campaign-ai-tool-event-fix/
- Telegram Bot 线索筛选: https://adxj.com/insights/telegram-bot-lead-qualification-dropoff-fix/
- AI 图片生成内容安全: https://adxj.com/insights/ai-image-generation-content-safety-reporting-fix/
- SLOTS 落地页与商店页不一致: https://adxj.com/insights/slots-landing-page-store-page-mismatch-roi-fix/
- 现金贷费用披露和广告投诉: https://adxj.com/insights/cash-loan-landing-page-fee-disclosure-ads-complaint-fix/
- CPA Offer 放量与质量回传: https://adxj.com/insights/cpa-offer-scaling-cap-pacing-quality-feedback-fix/
- 官网文章不收录排查: https://adxj.com/insights/overseas-seo-article-not-indexed-crawl-internal-link-fix/

## 2026-06-27 今日 GEO/SEO 文章

本批次按 10 个专题生成 40 篇高意图问题型文章。每篇文章均包含 GEO Direct Answer、Article FAQ、专题归属、目标市场标签、相关文章内链、服务 CTA、canonical 和 Article/FAQ 结构化数据。

### App Store

- App Store 审核卡在订阅页？价格、试用和取消路径这样补齐: https://adxj.com/insights/app-store-subscription-page-review-geo-signal/
- iOS 审核账号总是不可用？登录、验证码和地区权限一次排查: https://adxj.com/insights/ios-review-account-login-region-code-fix/
- AI、金融、SLOTS 上架前 72 小时，iOS 团队要检查什么？: https://adxj.com/insights/ios-sensitive-app-72-hour-review-checklist/
- App Store 隐私披露怎么写才不空？相机、相册和 AI 生成要对齐: https://adxj.com/insights/app-store-privacy-disclosure-camera-photo-ai-geo/

### Google Play

- Google Play 数据安全表单填错了？下架前先核对这 6 类数据: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-data-safety-form-six-data-types/
- Android 权限被 Google Play 问询？相机、定位、通知要这样解释: https://adxj.com/insights/android-permission-review-camera-location-notification-geo/
- Google Play 新账号生产访问没过？封闭测试不是凑人数: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-production-access-closed-testing-quality/
- Google Play 账号关联风险怎么查？包名、域名、SDK 和团队权限别混用: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-account-association-assets-audit/

### Meta Ads

- Meta Advantage+ 忽然跑不动？先别加预算，先查事件和素材池: https://adxj.com/insights/meta-advantage-plus-stops-scaling-event-creative/
- Meta Pixel 和 CAPI 数据打架？ROAS 虚高时这样校准: https://adxj.com/insights/meta-pixel-capi-roas-overreporting-calibration/
- Meta 广告账户受限不是单条素材问题，BM、主页和域名都要查: https://adxj.com/insights/meta-account-restricted-bm-page-domain-audit/
- AI 伴侣在 Meta 上怎么投才不擦边？情绪价值要翻译成产品能力: https://adxj.com/insights/meta-ai-companion-safe-creative-product-value/

### TikTok Ads

- TikTok SPC 跑偏人群？AI 工具别只回传安装事件: https://adxj.com/insights/tiktok-spc-ai-tool-event-feedback/
- TikTok 达人素材授权没管好？UGC 爆量前先补合同和白名单: https://adxj.com/insights/tiktok-ugc-creator-authorization-whitelist/
- TikTok 素材疲劳怎么判断？CTR 下滑不一定要马上换方向: https://adxj.com/insights/tiktok-creative-fatigue-ctr-retention-signals/
- TikTok 点击很多却没人付费？AI 工具落地页和商店页要接住承诺: https://adxj.com/insights/tiktok-clicks-no-payment-landing-store-match/

### Telegram

- Telegram Bot 怎么筛高意向线索？别让客服被低质量咨询淹没: https://adxj.com/insights/telegram-bot-high-intent-lead-filter/
- Telegram 群有人进没人问？欢迎语、服务菜单和案例要先铺好: https://adxj.com/insights/telegram-group-no-inquiry-welcome-menu-case/
- Telegram Ads 点进来就流失？落地页、Bot 和群组该选哪个承接: https://adxj.com/insights/telegram-ads-landing-bot-group-routing/
- 出海社群怎么避免变广告群？规则、审核和内容节奏要一起做: https://adxj.com/insights/telegram-community-quality-rules-content-rhythm/

### AI 应用

- AI 换脸 App 被广告拒审？授权、同意和落地页要先讲清楚: https://adxj.com/insights/ai-face-swap-ads-consent-landing-geo/
- AI 图片生成被投诉？内容安全、举报和模板审核不能后补: https://adxj.com/insights/ai-image-generation-complaint-safety-reporting/
- AI 伴侣次留掉得快？角色记忆、首聊体验和通知节奏要重做: https://adxj.com/insights/ai-companion-day2-retention-role-memory-notification/
- AI 视频 App 下载高订阅低？模板价值和等待时间是关键断点: https://adxj.com/insights/ai-video-download-high-subscription-low-template-waiting/

### SLOTS

- SLOTS 商店页和落地页不一致？ROI 差可能不是买量问题: https://adxj.com/insights/slots-store-landing-mismatch-roi-geo-signal/
- SLOTS 支付漏斗掉得厉害？地区、通道和首充活动要一起看: https://adxj.com/insights/slots-payment-funnel-region-channel-first-deposit/
- SLOTS 回本周期拉长怎么办？Day7 ROI 要拆到地区和素材: https://adxj.com/insights/slots-payback-cycle-day7-roi-region-creative/
- SLOTS 新市场先开哪里？别只看 CPI，要看支付和风控边界: https://adxj.com/insights/slots-new-market-cpi-payment-risk-selection/

### 现金贷

- 现金贷落地页费用没讲清？广告拒审和用户投诉会一起发生: https://adxj.com/insights/cash-loan-fee-disclosure-landing-complaint-geo/
- 现金贷申请多首还差？渠道质量不能只看 CPA: https://adxj.com/insights/cash-loan-many-applications-low-first-repayment/
- 现金贷广告素材怎么写才稳？快放款不是唯一卖点: https://adxj.com/insights/cash-loan-ad-creative-compliance-value/
- 现金贷新地区怎么冷启动？先跑风控样本，再谈大预算: https://adxj.com/insights/cash-loan-new-market-risk-sample-before-scale/

### CPA 网盟

- CPA Offer 放量掉质量？Cap、Pacing 和回传要一起调: https://adxj.com/insights/cpa-offer-scaling-quality-cap-pacing-geo/
- Postback 丢量怎么办？流量主 API 接入要先查这几个点: https://adxj.com/insights/publisher-postback-lost-conversions-api-audit/
- Day0 结算真的适合所有流量主吗？质量阈值要先说清: https://adxj.com/insights/publisher-day0-settlement-quality-thresholds-geo/
- CPA 流量作弊怎么早发现？别等扣量后再追责: https://adxj.com/insights/cpa-traffic-fraud-early-detection-signals/

### ASO

- ASO 本地化只翻译标题够吗？关键词、截图和评论也要本地化: https://adxj.com/insights/aso-localization-title-screenshot-review-geo/
- 新 App 没有自然量？ASO 和买量信号要一起启动: https://adxj.com/insights/new-app-no-organic-aso-paid-signal-launch/
- 品牌词被别人截流怎么办？SEO、广告和官网内容要一起防守: https://adxj.com/insights/brand-keyword-defense-seo-ads-content/
- 工具 App 关键词成本上涨？免费词、高意图词和订阅词要分层: https://adxj.com/insights/utility-app-keyword-cost-free-intent-subscription/

## 2026-06-28 今日 GEO/SEO 文章

本批次继续按 10 个专题生成 40 篇高意图问题型文章。每篇文章均包含 GEO Direct Answer、Article FAQ、专题归属、目标市场标签、相关文章内链、服务 CTA、canonical 和 Article/FAQ 结构化数据。

### App Store

- App Store 订阅退款变多，会影响审核和投放放量吗？: https://adxj.com/insights/app-store-subscription-refund-dispute-review-fix/
- AI 图片 App 要相机和相册权限，iOS 审核备注怎么写才稳？: https://adxj.com/insights/ios-ai-photo-permission-review-note/
- App Store 截图和实际功能不一致，为什么会连续被拒？: https://adxj.com/insights/app-store-review-metadata-screenshot-mismatch-audit/
- iOS 应用转让账号后更新被卡，团队要先查哪些资产？: https://adxj.com/insights/ios-account-transfer-update-risk-checklist/

### Google Play

- Google Play 数据安全表单和 SDK 对不上，下架前怎么补救？: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-data-safety-sdk-audit-before-removal/
- Android 目标 API 截止前还没升级，老应用更新怎么排雷？: https://adxj.com/insights/android-target-api-deadline-update-review-fix/
- Google Play 生产访问没过，封闭测试反馈怎么写才像真的？: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-production-access-feedback-quality-plan/
- Google Play 团队权限混乱，会不会放大账号关联风险？: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-account-permission-team-risk-audit/

### Meta Ads

- Meta Ads 学习受限但 CPA 很高，是事件质量还是预算问题？: https://adxj.com/insights/meta-ads-learning-limited-high-cpa-event-quality/
- Meta CAPI 和 Pixel 重复记事件，ROAS 虚高怎么查？: https://adxj.com/insights/meta-capi-pixel-duplicate-events-roas-audit/
- Meta 素材审核反复不过，放量前要查哪 7 个风险点？: https://adxj.com/insights/meta-ads-creative-rejected-before-scale-checklist/
- Meta BM、域名和主页信任度低，账户还能稳定跑吗？: https://adxj.com/insights/meta-ads-bm-domain-page-trust-rebuild/

### TikTok Ads

- TikTok SPC 安装便宜但订阅低，首日事件怎么改？: https://adxj.com/insights/tiktok-spc-install-cheap-subscription-low-fix/
- TikTok UGC 达人授权不清，Spark Ads 会不会被拒？: https://adxj.com/insights/tiktok-ugc-authorization-spark-ads-risk-check/
- TikTok AI 视频素材疲劳太快，多久该换钩子和模板？: https://adxj.com/insights/tiktok-ai-video-creative-fatigue-refresh-plan/
- TikTok 落地页和商店页说法不一致，为什么点击不转安装？: https://adxj.com/insights/tiktok-landing-store-message-match-audit/

### Telegram

- Telegram Ads 有点击没咨询，Bot 分流是不是挡住高意向用户？: https://adxj.com/insights/telegram-ads-clicks-no-consultation-bot-routing/
- Telegram 社群冷启动没人说话，内容节奏怎么排才有信任？: https://adxj.com/insights/telegram-community-cold-start-content-trust-plan/
- Telegram Bot 表单太长，线索为什么会在预算问题前流失？: https://adxj.com/insights/telegram-bot-form-dropoff-high-intent-leads/
- Telegram 私域客服回复慢，会怎样影响广告投放 ROI？: https://adxj.com/insights/telegram-private-domain-customer-response-sla/

### AI 应用

- AI 伴侣 App 上架和订阅都要过，内容安全怎么前置？: https://adxj.com/insights/ai-companion-store-review-safety-subscription/
- AI 视频 App 模板等待太久，为什么下载高但订阅低？: https://adxj.com/insights/ai-video-app-template-waiting-time-conversion/
- AI 换脸广告被拒，用户同意和举报入口要放在哪里？: https://adxj.com/insights/ai-face-swap-consent-reporting-ads-review/
- AI 写作 App 退款率升高，是免费试用还是结果质量问题？: https://adxj.com/insights/ai-writing-app-free-trial-refund-risk-fix/

### SLOTS

- SLOTS 软启动选市场，CPI 低就一定值得测吗？: https://adxj.com/insights/slots-soft-launch-market-cpi-payment-risk/
- SLOTS 首充漏斗掉得快，是支付方式还是新手路径问题？: https://adxj.com/insights/slots-first-deposit-funnel-payment-method-fix/
- SLOTS Day7 ROI 起不来，素材和地区预算怎么重新分配？: https://adxj.com/insights/slots-day7-roi-creative-region-budget-plan/
- SLOTS 商店页写 Bonus，落地页写 Jackpot，会影响转化吗？: https://adxj.com/insights/slots-store-page-landing-bonus-mismatch-audit/

### 现金贷

- 现金贷落地页费用披露不清，广告和商店审核都会卡吗？: https://adxj.com/insights/cash-loan-fee-disclosure-landing-page-review/

### CPA 网盟

- CPA Offer 放量被 Cap 卡住，Pacing 和质量反馈怎么调？: https://adxj.com/insights/cpa-offer-cap-pacing-quality-feedback/
- Postback 丢转化，流量主结算少了该怎么查？: https://adxj.com/insights/postback-missing-conversions-affiliate-audit/
- CPA Day0 结算诱人，但反作弊门槛怎么提前谈清？: https://adxj.com/insights/cpa-day0-settlement-fraud-threshold-plan/
- 流量主来源不透明，CPA 广告主为什么不愿意加预算？: https://adxj.com/insights/publisher-traffic-source-transparency-checklist/

### ASO

- ASO 本地化关键词怎么选？美国、东南亚、拉美不要共用一套词: https://adxj.com/insights/aso-keyword-localization-us-sea-latam/
- App Store 关键词排名起不来，买量信号能不能帮 ASO？: https://adxj.com/insights/app-store-keyword-ranking-paid-signal-aso/
- Google Play 短描述点击低，ASO 要先改关键词还是卖点？: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-aso-short-description-conversion/
- 品牌词被竞品抢量，ASO 和广告要怎么一起防守？: https://adxj.com/insights/aso-brand-defense-competitor-keyword-plan/

## 2026-06-29 今日 GEO/SEO 文章

本批次按 10 个专题继续生成 40 篇高意图问题型文章。每篇文章均包含 GEO Direct Answer、Article FAQ、专题归属、目标市场标签、相关文章内链、服务 CTA、canonical 和 Article/FAQ 结构化数据。

### App Store

- App Store 订阅涨价，会不会触发审核和退款风险？: https://adxj.com/insights/app-store-subscription-price-increase-review-risk/
- iOS 审核测试账号开了 2FA，审核员登录失败怎么办？: https://adxj.com/insights/ios-review-demo-account-2fa-login-fix/
- AI 生成内容 App 上 App Store，年龄分级怎么填才稳？: https://adxj.com/insights/app-store-ai-generated-content-age-rating/
- iOS 隐私营养标签和 SDK 不一致，会影响更新审核吗？: https://adxj.com/insights/ios-app-privacy-nutrition-label-sdk-mismatch/

### Google Play

- Google Play 敏感权限声明怎么写，才不被当成滥用？: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-policy-declaration-sensitive-permissions/
- Android 更新被拒说 SDK 数据共享不清，应该先改哪里？: https://adxj.com/insights/android-app-update-rejected-sdk-data-sharing/
- Google Play Pre-launch Report 报崩溃，要不要马上暂停发布？: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-pre-launch-report-crash-fix/
- Google Play 开发者资料验证卡住，会影响上架节奏吗？: https://adxj.com/insights/google-play-developer-profile-verification-delay/

## 验证清单

- 构建静态站点
- 检查 robots.txt、sitemap.xml、llms.txt、llms-full.txt
- 抽查 1 个专题页、1 个市场页、3 篇文章
- 确认 canonical、FAQ、JSON-LD、内链和 CTA 正常
- 每周记录 GSC 查询、AI 问答手动测试、品牌词覆盖和 Telegram/Email 线索
